title: Apply poison baits for vertebrate pest control in rural and environmental landscapes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply poison baits for vertebrate pest control in rural and environmental landscapes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify vertebrate pests' species and prepare a poison baiting program

pcs.text: Identify the pest animal species and abundance in target area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the pest animal species and abundance in target area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the pest animal species and abundance in target area.

pcs.text: Assess the type, availability and mode of action of poison for control of pest animal species in target area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the type, availability and mode of action of poison for control of pest animal species in target area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the type, availability and mode of action of poison for control of pest animal species in target area.

pcs.text: Identify key aspects of pest animal species ecology, habitat use and control program objectives to determine the timing and extent of baiting program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify key aspects of pest animal species ecology, habitat use and control program objectives to determine the timing and extent of baiting program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify key aspects of pest animal species ecology, habitat use and control program objectives to determine the timing and extent of baiting program.

pcs.text: Assess public health, safety hazards, risks and regulatory restrictions for control options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess public health, safety hazards, risks and regulatory restrictions for control options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess public health, safety hazards, risks and regulatory restrictions for control options.

pcs.text: Assess environmental conditions and off target risk for control options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess environmental conditions and off target risk for control options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess environmental conditions and off target risk for control options.

pcs.text: Select appropriate control option, baiting technique, poison and delivery method appropriate for target pest species, location and landscape
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate control option, baiting technique, poison and delivery method appropriate for target pest species, location and landscape?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate control option, baiting technique, poison and delivery method appropriate for target pest species, location and landscape.

pcs.text: Prepare baiting program to maximise pest animal control objectives according to legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare baiting program to maximise pest animal control objectives according to legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare baiting program to maximise pest animal control objectives according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Determine monitoring and reporting protocols to evaluate effectiveness of baiting program according to legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine monitoring and reporting protocols to evaluate effectiveness of baiting program according to legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine monitoring and reporting protocols to evaluate effectiveness of baiting program according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify vertebrate pests' species and prepare a poison baiting program

elements.title: Obtain and confirm approvals for accessing and using poison baits

pcs.text: Identify necessary approvals and notification requirements for the location of the baiting program and poison use according to legislative and regulatory requirements and toxin/poison label requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify necessary approvals and notification requirements for the location of the baiting program and poison use according to legislative and regulatory requirements and toxin/poison label requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify necessary approvals and notification requirements for the location of the baiting program and poison use according to legislative and regulatory requirements and toxin/poison label requirements.

pcs.text: Access and complete documentation to gain approvals for use of poisons and baits according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and complete documentation to gain approvals for use of poisons and baits according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and complete documentation to gain approvals for use of poisons and baits according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure approvals have been granted, received and filed according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure approvals have been granted, received and filed according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure approvals have been granted, received and filed according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Notify stakeholders of intended baiting  program according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify stakeholders of intended baiting  program according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify stakeholders of intended baiting  program according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Obtain and confirm approvals for accessing and using poison baits

elements.title: Prepare, transport and store baits

pcs.text: Determine the type of bait, quantity and dose rate of poison for the pest control program according to poison label and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the type of bait, quantity and dose rate of poison for the pest control program according to poison label and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the type of bait, quantity and dose rate of poison for the pest control program according to poison label and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment for baits according to chemical label and safety data sheets (SDS)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment for baits according to chemical label and safety data sheets (SDS)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment for baits according to chemical label and safety data sheets (SDS).

pcs.text: Select suitable location to prepare poison bait according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements, codes of practice or guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select suitable location to prepare poison bait according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements, codes of practice or guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select suitable location to prepare poison bait according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements, codes of practice or guidelines.

pcs.text: Prepare bait for the target species, bait substrate/material and poison according to label and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare bait for the target species, bait substrate/material and poison according to label and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare bait for the target species, bait substrate/material and poison according to label and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Transport poisons and prepared baits according to legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport poisons and prepared baits according to legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport poisons and prepared baits according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare baits for storage according to baiting program requirements, type of bait and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare baits for storage according to baiting program requirements, type of bait and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare baits for storage according to baiting program requirements, type of bait and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Store the treated baits safety according to workplace procedures, legislative and regulatory requirements and poison label directions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store the treated baits safety according to workplace procedures, legislative and regulatory requirements and poison label directions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store the treated baits safety according to workplace procedures, legislative and regulatory requirements and poison label directions.

pcs.text: Clean and decontaminate bait preparation and distribution equipment according to operator instructions, SDS and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and decontaminate bait preparation and distribution equipment according to operator instructions, SDS and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and decontaminate bait preparation and distribution equipment according to operator instructions, SDS and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor and assess weather conditions and forecasts to ensure effective conditions for baiting to proceed

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and assess weather conditions and forecasts to ensure effective conditions for baiting to proceed.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure notifications have been communicated and signage installed prior to baiting program according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards and risks and implement controls when handling and distributing baits according to workplace procedures, poison label directions and SDS?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards and risks and implement controls when handling and distributing baits according to workplace procedures, poison label directions and SDS.

pcs.text: Distribute baits in target area to maximise target pest access and minimise off target risk according to label directions and baiting program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Distribute baits in target area to maximise target pest access and minimise off target risk according to label directions and baiting program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Distribute baits in target area to maximise target pest access and minimise off target risk according to label directions and baiting program.

pcs.text: Monitor bait uptake and control outcomes in a timely manner according to baiting program requirements, poison label directions and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor bait uptake and control outcomes in a timely manner according to baiting program requirements, poison label directions and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor bait uptake and control outcomes in a timely manner according to baiting program requirements, poison label directions and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Clean up and dispose of baits according to poison label instructions, workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean up and dispose of baits according to poison label instructions, workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.
